title: National Policy & Advocacy Campaigner
raw_description: See current openings Why you should join the Solar United Neighbors team Remote work Our HQ is in D. , but most of our team is spread across the U. Read our mission and vision As a parent of young kids, SUN is a supportive and flexible workplace. Roger Horowitz, Vice President of Go Solar Programs and support We provide full-time staff with a competitive total compensation package, including: Employer-sponsored health insurance (84% coverage for employees and dependents) 15 vacation days and 23 wellness days per year Paid holiday on all federal holidays — plus the day after Thanksgiving, the week between Christmas and New Year’s Day off, and two additional days of your choice Parental, family care, self-care, volunteer, bereavement, and jury leave 401(k) retirement account with match up to 2% after 1 year $1,000 professional development budget $50/month stipend for phone and internet SUN welcomes candidates of diverse backgrounds and experience to apply, including people of color, women, LGBTQ+, people with disabilities, veterans, and those with a non-traditional education. If our mission and goals are the “what” of our work, our values are the “how.

title: Field Sales Consultant
salary: compensation in California (Base pay + Incentives) for the first 12 months ranges from $60,000 to $90,000
raw_salary: compensation in California (Base pay + Incentives) for the first 12 months ranges from $60,000 to $90,000
raw_description: The Field Sales Consultant self-generates sales leads and presents in-home presentations on our solar products and services for potential customers. Provide an industry leading customer sales experience from initial contact through installation and after the customer's system is turned on. Handle the pipeline of activity from prospect to install by following up with all leads and in-home consultations. Employees on our Freedom Time Off Plan are not limited to a set number of days that they are entitled to take off from work and instead have the freedom to manage how much time off they need!. Please note that the compensation information is made in good faith for this position only.

raw_description: See current openings Why you should join the Solar United Neighbors team Remote work Our HQ is in D. , but most of our team is spread across the U. Read our mission and vision As a parent of young kids, SUN is a supportive and flexible workplace. Roger Horowitz, Vice President of Go Solar Programs and support We provide full-time staff with a competitive total compensation package, including: Employer-sponsored health insurance (84% coverage for employees and dependents) 15 vacation days and 23 wellness days per year Paid holiday on all federal holidays — plus the day after Thanksgiving, the week between Christmas and New Year’s Day off, and two additional days of your choice Parental, family care, self-care, volunteer, bereavement, and jury leave 401(k) retirement account with match up to 2% after 1 year $1,000 professional development budget $50/month stipend for phone and internet SUN welcomes candidates of diverse backgrounds and experience to apply, including people of color, women, LGBTQ+, people with disabilities, veterans, and those with a non-traditional education. If our mission and goals are the “what” of our work, our values are the “how.

title: Junior Fund Asset Manager
raw_description: To support our ambitious growth plans and long-term ownership of energy assets, we are expanding our team. Working closely with Fund Asset Managers, Asset Management teams, and central functions, the successful candidate will develop a strong understanding of asset performance drivers, commercial structures, and fund priorities. This is a hands-on, execution-focused role with significant exposure to real asset challenges. The successful candidate will take ownership of defined workstreams across performance analysis, issue management, and optimisation initiatives, while building towards full asset accountability over time. The role will be based in London at least three days per week, with some flexibility for remote working.

title: Manager de proximité & Logistique
raw_description: 🐙 Rejoins la révolution énergétique chez Octopus Energy! Octopus Energy, fournisseur d’énergie verte présent à l’international, a lancé sa filiale Octopus Energy Services pour accompagner ses clients dans la décarbonation complète de leur foyer. Déjà bien implantée au Royaume-Uni, cette entité propose un ensemble de solutions techniques: installation de panneaux photovoltaïques, de bornes de recharge pour véhicules électriques et de systèmes de chauffage décarboné, le tout avec une approche centrée sur la qualité, l’innovation et sans sous-traitance. Tu veux un job qui a du sens? Octopus Energy Services a démarré son activité en 2024, avec un objectif clair: aider les particuliers à réduire leurs factures énergétiques tout en participant activement à la transition énergétique. Et aujourd’hui on a besoin de toi pour propulser notre croissance! Tes deux grandes missions:

title: Portfolio Manager - Energy Transition
raw_description: The role will lead fund management activity across these mandates, ensuring strong governance, disciplined financial oversight, high-quality investor reporting and robust portfolio analysis. You will work closely with the platform team, the Singapore team and the Ventures team to ensure the fund management approach remains joined-up across multiple investment types, jurisdictions and operating models. You will lead all energy transition valuations (including where co-invested with funds outside direct remit), coordinating inputs across teams and ensuring that valuation outputs are robust, well-evidenced and suitable for committee and investor scrutiny. You will directly manage two team members and will be accountable for the quality, consistency and development of the team’s output across monthly and quarterly valuations, investor reporting, governance materials, any lender and fund-level analysis. The role will suit someone who is comfortable operating across both established and scaling strategies, with private equity and/or infrastructure knowledge and who can combine attention to detail with a pragmatic and collaborative approach.

title: CRM Software Engineer
raw_description: 🌍 Revolucionamos la energía para cambiar el mundo En Octopus Energy, no somos una eléctrica tradicional. Somos un equipo de personas apasionadas que trabaja cada día para hacer que la energía sea 100% renovable, accesible y justa para todos. Creemos en la tecnología y la innovación como motores del cambio. Queremos transformar la forma en que el mundo consume energía, eliminando barreras, simplificando procesos y ofreciendo un servicio más humano y transparente. Por esto mismo, nuestro compromiso es claro: la energía limpia debe ser la norma, no la excepción. Para lograrlo, combinamos sostenibilidad con un enfoque centrado en las personas, impulsando un servicio excepcional y construyendo un equipo increíble que comparte nuestra visión. 💡 Pero nada de esto sería posible sin personas como tú. Para seguir creciendo y transformando el mercado, buscamos talento con ganas de marcar la diferencia. Si quieres formar parte de este cambio, aportar tu energía y ayudar a construir un futuro más verde. ¿Qué estamos buscando? ¡Nos encantaría incorporar un/a CRM Software Engineer a nuestro equipo de Octopus Energy! En este integrarás y automatizarás nuestro CRM (Zoho), trabajando codo con codo con diferentes stakeholders de la compañía ⚡️ 🐙 Lo llamamos el ‘Efecto Octopus’ Trabajar en Octopus Energy significa formar parte de una compañía donde la cultura importa de verdad. 💜 Apostamos por la autonomía y la responsabilidad real. 🚀 Valoramos la honestidad radical y el aprendizaje continuo. 🌱 Creemos en la tecnología como palanca de impacto. 🧠 Queremos personas curiosas, humildes y con ambición por hacer las cosas mejor cada día.

Si quieres formar parte de este cambio, aportar tu energía y ayudar a construir un futuro más verde. ¿Qué estamos buscando? ¡Nos encantaría incorporar un/a CRM Software Engineer a nuestro equipo de Octopus Energy! En este integrarás y automatizarás nuestro CRM (Zoho), trabajando codo con codo con diferentes stakeholders de la compañía ⚡️ 🐙 Lo llamamos el ‘Efecto Octopus’ Trabajar en Octopus Energy significa formar parte de una compañía donde la cultura importa de verdad. 💜 Apostamos por la autonomía y la responsabilidad real. 🚀 Valoramos la honestidad radical y el aprendizaje continuo. 🌱 Creemos en la tecnología como palanca de impacto. 🧠 Queremos personas curiosas, humildes y con ambición por hacer las cosas mejor cada día.

raw_description: With more than $16 billion in managed assets, our investments are diversified across multiple asset classes, including utility-scale solar, storage, and onshore wind; distributed solar and storage; RNG; and energy efficiency. Position Summary HASI is currently seeking a Director or Senior Director with renewable asset investing experience to join our team. title: Investment Manager - Tokyo
raw_description: To support our ambitious growth plans and long-term ownership of energy assets, we are expanding our team. title: Manager des Equipes Techniques
raw_description: 🐙 Rejoins la révolution énergétique chez Octopus Energy! Octopus Energy, fournisseur d’énergie verte présent à l’international, a lancé sa filiale Octopus Energy Services pour accompagner ses clients dans la décarbonation complète de leur foyer. Déjà bien implantée au Royaume-Uni, cette entité propose un ensemble de solutions techniques: installation de panneaux photovoltaïques, de bornes de recharge pour véhicules électriques et de systèmes de chauffage décarboné, le tout avec une approche centrée sur la qualité, l’innovation et sans sous-traitance. Tu veux un job qui a du sens? Octopus Energy Services a démarré son activité en 2024, avec un objectif clair: aider les particuliers à réduire leurs factures énergétiques tout en participant activement à la transition énergétique. Et aujourd’hui on a besoin de toi pour propulser notre croissance! Tes deux grandes missions:
